# Regression: stalls missing around a hole and in the face to its left.
# The face surrounding the hole should have stalls along its aisle-facing
# edges, and the face whose top-left corner touches the hole should still
# have stalls on the top half.

polygon outer
0,0
750,0
750,500
0,500
----
polygon outer: 4 vertices

polygon hole
275.43,152.80
475,150
375,350
----
hole: 3 vertices

generate
----
